summary: Microsoft-centric cloud, security, and modern-work solutions provider, positioned as 'Africa's Leading Cloud Solution Provider' and a subsidiary of Signal Alliance Technology Holding (SATH).
offering: Azure cloud setup/migration/management, Microsoft 365 and Dynamics 365 deployment, cybersecurity (Defender, Sentinel, Intune), and Power Apps solutions for digital transformation.

pricing.model: Microsoft licensing pass-through plus service/consulting fees

positioning: Deep Microsoft-ecosystem specialist for SMEs and enterprises undergoing cloud-led digital transformation, reinforced by a Microsoft Partner of the Year 2023 award via parent SATH.
strengths: Deep single-vendor (Microsoft) specialization with recent award recognition (Partner of the Year 2023)
Backed by SATH's 25+ years of technology holding experience and credibility
Strong, modern digital marketing presence (case studies, SME-focused content) indicating well-developed digital-first customer acquisition
gaps_or_weaknesses: Microsoft-only stack narrows addressable scope versus multi-vendor integrators
Newer standalone brand name (Cloudsa) versus its longer-established parent (SATH) could dilute brand recognition
perceived_target_customer: SMEs and enterprises standardizing on the Microsoft ecosystem for cloud, security, and productivity.
confidence_notes: Based on company website and press coverage of the Microsoft Partner of the Year award; customer volume and revenue are not publicly disclosed.
